title: MinDoktor - AI Symptom Checker for Swedish Market
problem: Swedish patients lack localized digital triage tools. Existing solutions are not adapted to Swedish healthcare pathways.
solution: Swedish-language AI symptom checker guiding patients to appropriate care based on local healthcare system structure.
technology: AI reasoning, Swedish NLP, healthcare pathway logic
varden_fit: High — Swedish-specific triage could integrate directly with Varden's booking system to route patients appropriately.
notes: Swedish localization is key differentiator vs global players like Ada.
